[about]  [projects]  [blog]

My name is John Holopainen Hadaway. I am an aspiring technologist and designer, broadly interested in the ways that we connect, deliberate, coordinate, and coexist in cities and on the internet.

Currently, I am doing my civil service at the Designmuseo. Previously, I worked in strategic urban research, digital design, and strategy, received a degree in history from the University of Chicago, and briefly studied architecture at the Architectural Association.

I am Finnish-Filipino-Australian, and currently based in Helsinki — via Chicago, Montpellier, London, Manila, Cebu City, Almaty, Moscow, and Jakarta. In my logged-off hours, I like to listen to music, cook, write, and rest. If any of the above interests you, get in touch via Twitter, Linkedin, or email. Here is my CV for your prodded snooping.
